heading: Enforcement, regulations, and construction
label: 4404 Enforcement, regulations, and construction
notes: Effective DateSubsecs. (a) and (c) effective one year after , see , set out as a note under .Feb. 27, 1986section 11(a) of Pub. L. 99–252section 4401 of this title

children.text: A violation of or the regulations promulgated pursuant to this chapter shall be considered a violation of .section 4402 of this titlesection 45 of this title

Any person who is found to violate any provision of section 4402 or 4403(a) of this title shall be guilty of a misdemeanor and shall on conviction thereof be subject to a fine of not more than $10,000.

children.heading: Regulations undersection 4402 of this title
children.label: b Regulations undersection 4402 of this title

children.text: Regulations issued by the Federal Trade Commission under shall be issued in accordance with .section 4402 of this titlesection 553 of title 5
Not later than 180 days after , the Federal Trade Commission shall promulgate such regulations as it may require to implement .February 27, 1986section 4402 of this title

children.heading: Construction
children.label: c Construction
children.text: Nothing in this chapter (other than the requirements of sections 4402 and 4403 of this title) shall be construed to limit, restrict, or expand the authority of the Federal Trade Commission with respect to unfair or deceptive acts or practices in the advertising of smokeless tobacco products.
